text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: What the? The heck're you staring at?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing. I just find it so amusing that 
everyone treats you like their big sister.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to try it myself sometime… 
What if I called you… Big Sis?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm not your Big Sis! Besides, you'd never 
use something so plain!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Knowing you, you'd go with something 
flowery like "Dearest Sister," or ——

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
To think you would call me that… 
I must say, I'm delighted!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What?! Th-that was just an example! 
Forget you ever heard it!!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! I believe that will be 
rather difficult, Big Sis♪
